---
title: "Filippo Gambarota"
author: Filippo Gambarota
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
bibliography: "bib/mypublication.bib"
cls: "bib/apa.cls"
output:
  pagedown::html_resume:    
    # set it to true for a self-contained HTML page but it'll take longer to render
    self_contained: false
---

Aside
================================================================================


![Filippo Gambarota](img/photo.jpg){width=60%}


Contact Info {#contact}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> filippo.gambarota@gmail.com
- <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> filippo.gambarota@phd.unipd.it
- <i class="fa fa-github"></i> [github.com/filippogambarota](https://github.com/filippogambarota)
- <i class="fa fa-twitter"></i> [fgambarota](https://twitter.com/fgambarota)
- <i class="fa fa-globe"></i> [filippogambarota.netlify.com](https://filippogambarota.netlify.com/)

Skills {#skills}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Fluent R user

- Knowledge of Matlab, Latex, RMarkdown


Disclaimer {#disclaimer}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This resume was made with the R package [**pagedown**](https://github.com/rstudio/pagedown).

Last updated on `r Sys.Date()`.



Main
================================================================================

Filippo Gambarota {#title}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### PhD Student at the [University of Padua](www.unipd.it)

I'm a PhD student in Psychological Science at the University of Padua. My research interests regard social and affective neuroscience, in particular the Visual Working Memory in social cognition. Moreover, I'm interested in unconscious cognitive processing of salient stimuli.


Education {data-icon=graduation-cap data-concise=true}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### University of Padua

B.S. in Psychology

Padua, Italy

2016

Thesis: Psychosocial well-being of adolescents with oncoemathological disease

### University of Padua

M.S. in Clinical Developmental Psychology

Padua, Italy

2018

Thesis: Visual Working Memory representations of infant faces during pregnancy as an adaptive mechanism. An EEG study.


Research Experience {data-icon=laptop}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Graduate Research Assistant

Beijing Institute of Genomics, Chinese Academy of Sciences

Beijing, China

2011 - 2014

- Performed computational biology research towards understanding regulation of alternative splicing in human and mouse transcriptome.
- Found EGFR pathway related mutations, aimed to understand the impacts of cancer mutations on EGFR signaling pathway.
  

Professional Experience {data-icon=suitcase}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Data Scientist, intern

SupStat Inc.

Beijing, China

2014

::: concise
- Taught R language to beginners. 
- Wrote Shiny app demos.
- Converted statistical tutorials from SPSS to R language.
:::

Teaching Experience {data-icon=chalkboard-teacher}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Introduction to R Language for Beginners.

Instructor of R and Data Mining Training Courses at SupStat Inc.

Beijing, China

2014

Selected Publications and Posters {data-icon=file}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
